title: Kacluchiym #3695
definition:
Casluhim = "fortified"

 1) a people or tribe descended from Mizraim (Egypt) progenitors of
    the Philistines and Caphtorim
nasbUsage:
Definition: Casluhim = "fortified"

 1) a people or tribe descended from Mizraim (Egypt) progenitors of
    the Philistines and Caphtorim

    NASB:  a people desc. from Mizraim, prob. ancestors of the Philistines
